package rulefixtures

// scenario for url_parse_in_loop_on_invariant_base: url.Parse(...) or ParseRequestURI(...) observed inside loops with a stable-looking base input.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule372NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario372Negative(records []Rule372NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
